ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drones" (
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drone */,
  "drone_name" TEXT /* Name of the drone */,
  "drone_type" INTEGER /* Type of the drone (e.g., quadcopter, hexacopter) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drone */,
  "drone_model" TEXT /* Model of the drone */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the drone */,
  "manufacture_date" TEXT /* Date of manufacture */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the drone (e.g., active, maintenance, retired) */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "total_flight_hours" REAL /* Total flight hours of the drone */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drone that flew the mission */,
  "mission_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "mission_type" INTEGER /* Type of the mission (e.g., surveillance, mapping) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the mission */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the mission */,
  "mission_status" TEXT /* Status of the mission (e.g., planned, in progress, completed, aborted) */,
  "pilot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pilot responsible for the mission */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the mission */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the mission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_mission_type FOREIGN KEY ("mission_type") REFERENCES mission_types ("mission_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_data" (
  "flight_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each flight data entry */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission that the flight data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the flight data */,
  "x" REAL /* X-coordinate of the drone's position */,
  "y" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the drone's position */,
  "z" REAL /* Z-coordinate of the drone's position */,
  "yaw" REAL /* Yaw angle of the drone */,
  "yawspeed" REAL /* Yaw speed of the drone */,
  "vx" REAL /* X-component of the drone's velocity */,
  "vy" REAL /* Y-component of the drone's velocity */,
  "vz" REAL /* Z-component of the drone's velocity */,
  "acc_x" REAL /* X-component of the drone's acceleration */,
  "acc_y" REAL /* Y-component of the drone's acceleration */,
  "acc_z" REAL /* Z-component of the drone's acceleration */,
  "thrust_0" REAL /* Thrust level of the drone's first motor */,
  "thrust_1" REAL /* Thrust level of the drone's second motor */,
  "thrust_2" REAL /* Thrust level of the drone's third motor */,
  "battery_level" REAL /* Battery level at the time of data collection */,
  "gps_signal_strength" REAL /* GPS signal strength */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed */,
  "wind_direction" REAL /* Wind direction */,
  "barometric_pressure" REAL /* Barometric pressure */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flight_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the flight data */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the flight data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser) used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "flight_data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "flight_data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the flight data that the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the flight data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_versions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_flight_data_versions_flight_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("flight_data_id") REFERENCES flight_data ("flight_data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "drone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the drone that the sensor belongs to */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., GPS, accelerometer) */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "sensor_firmware_version" TEXT /* Firmware version of the sensor */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the sensor is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_drone_id FOREIGN KEY ("drone_id") REFERENCES drones ("drone_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "sensor_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor data entry */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission that the sensor data belongs to */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the sensor data */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the sensor data */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the sensor data */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag for the sensor data (e.g., good, suspect, bad) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_types" (
  "mission_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission type */,
  "mission_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mission type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the mission type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drone_types" (
  "drone_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drone type */,
  "drone_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the drone type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drone type */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the drone type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("drone_type_id")
)
